Sender: Inspector of Quarries, Department of Mines & Quarries
Recipient: Monsieur E. Baraize, Directeur de Travaux du Service des Antiquités, à Louxor
Brief_Summary: A provisional permit is granted to the Inspector of Antiquities at Luxor for one month to extract sand from the Bayadia site, pending a full survey and official handover.
English_Translation:
GENERAL
OF THE
ANTIQUITIES

Cairo, 11 March 1923
[Handwritten Arabic: 10]

Depart-ent of Mines & Quarries.
[Handwritten: Cr. 8th March, 1923]

No.71.7/1

Permit

The Inspector of Antiquities at Luxor
is hereby authorized to extract sand
from the site at Bayadia which has been
indicated by him to the Mulahiz of
Quarries of Luxor.

This permit is granded provisionally for
-a period of one month from to-day pending
the survey of the site and its definite
delivery to him.

[Handwritten signature: illegible]
Inspt of Quarries.

AF/3

[Stamp: Faint circular stamp, partially legible "OFFICE..."]
[Pencil note: faint, illegible]
Monsieur E. Baraize,
Directeur de Travaux du Service des
Antiquités, at Luxor
Confidence_Notes: The French header 'ON GÉNÉRALE DU DES ANTIQUITÉS' and the recipient's title 'eur E. Baraize, eur de Travaux du Sce tiquités, à Louxor' appear incomplete in the raw transcription. The signature is illegible, and the stamp and pencil note are faint/illegible.
Full_Transcription:
ON GÉNÉRALE
DU
DES ANTIQUITÉS

Caire, le II Mars 1923
[Handwritten Arabic: ١٠]

Depart-ent of Mines & Quarries.
[Handwritten: Cr. 8th March, 1923]

No.71.7/1

Permit

The Inspector of Antiquities at Luxor
is hereby authorized to extract sand
from the site at Bayadia which has been
indicated by him to the Mulahiz of
Quarries of Luxor.

This permit is granded provisionally for
-a period of one month from to-day pending
the survey of the site and its definite
delivery to him.

[Handwritten signature: illegible]
Inspt of Quarries.

AF/3

[Stamp: Faint circular stamp, partially legible "OFFICE..."]
[Pencil note: faint, illegible]
eur E. Baraize,
eur de Travaux du Sce
tiquités, à Louxor
